title: calla aromatica
intro: Calla aromatica, also known as the False Calla, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calla aromatica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
